2605.23652.title: One Policy, Infinite NPCs: Persona-Traceable Shared RL Policies for Scalable Game Agents
2605.23652.paper_summary: On a 300-persona life-simulation benchmark, pcsp achieves compositional zero-shot persona identification up to 17x above chance, Spearman rho approx 0.73 semantic-behavioral alignment, and 22x faster inference than an LLM-as-policy baseline. Life simulation games require hundreds to thousands of non-player characters (NPCs) that behave consistently with distinct personalities while remaining controllable through designer-authored natural language. Existing methods fail on constraints like persona consistency, controllability, or real-time inference. We introduce pcsp (Persona Conditioned Shared Policy), a single reinforcement learning policy conditioned on frozen LLM embeddings of free-form persona descriptions. pcsp combines once-per-NPC persona encoding, low-rank persona projection, neural persona conditioning, and a PPO + InfoNCE consistency + KL diversity training objective. Across three experimental settings, ablations show that the InfoNCE trajectory-consistency objective is load bearing: removing it collapses zero-shot persona identification to chance. External validation on Melting Pot 2.4.0 substrates confirms that our method produces persona-conditioned behavioral divergence in multi-agent strategic environments. We distinguish two senses of held-out evaluation: compositional zero-shot and vocabulary-expansion held-out. Finally, a UE5 deployment reproduces the in-engine persona-conditioning ablation at 64 agents with a low failure rate, showing that the sub-frame inference profile survives in a commercial game engine. These results prove that shared RL policies can support scalable, real-time, persona-conditioned NPC control.
2605.23652.paper_summary_zh: 在一個300人角色模擬基準上，pcsp實現了高達17倍於隨機機率的組合零-shot角色識別，Spearman rho約為0.73的語義-行為對齊，以及比LLM作為政策基準快22倍的推理。生活模擬遊戲需要數百到數千個非玩家角色（NPC），這些角色在保持可控的同時，必須以獨特的個性一致地行為，並通過設計師撰寫的自然語言進行控制。現有方法在角色一致性、可控性或實時推理等約束下失敗。我們介紹了pcsp（基於角色的共享政策），這是一種單一的強化學習政策，基於凍結的LLM嵌入的自由形式角色描述進行條件化。pcsp結合了每個NPC一次的角色編碼、低秩角色投影、神經角色條件化，以及PPO + InfoNCE一致性 + KL多樣性訓練目標。在三個實驗設置中，消融實驗顯示InfoNCE軌跡一致性目標是承重的：去除它會使零-shot角色識別崩潰至隨機機率。對Melting Pot 2.4.0基質的外部驗證確認我們的方法在多代理戰略環境中產生了基於角色的行為差異。我們區分了兩種保留評估的意義：組合零-shot和詞彙擴展保留。最後，UE5部署在64個代理中重現了引擎內的角色條件消融，且失敗率低，顯示子幀推理配置在商業遊戲引擎中仍然存在。這些結果證明共享RL政策可以支持可擴展的實時基於角色的NPC控制。
2605.23652.author: Yoosung Hong et.al.
